CustomField.description: Discount-approval approver for this deal, set by segment (Enterprise vs SMB) via the routing flow. Used as the `relatedUserField` approver in the Discount Approval process. Replaces the dropped Enterprise/SMB Deal Desk queues.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The user who approves discounts on this deal. Set by the routing flow.
CustomField.label: Deal Desk Approver
